'''Hekis Durumm Perdo Kolokk Baldikarr Thun''' was the [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] of the [[Mechis III/Legends|Mechis III]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Factory/Legends|factories]]. One of the few [[Human/Legends|Humans]] living on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], Thun was in charge when [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88A]] arrived after escaping from [[Holowan Laboratories/Legends|Holowan Laboratories]]. A vain [[Gender/Legends|man]], Thun added new, grandiose titles to his name whenever he felt unappreciated by his superiors, increasing the apparent importance of his own signature. His [[Administrative droid/Legends|administrative droid]], [[3D-4X]], delivered his master's afternoon [[stim tea]] and production reports at the same time every day, and Thun saw it as the high point of his schedule. On the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] that IG-88A arrived in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of Mechis III, 3D-4X delivered the tea and reports at the appointed time, but while Thun sipped his tea, 3D-4X shot him twice with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. Thun and the other seventy-two [[Human/Legends|Humans]] on the planet were killed in an [[Mechis III Uprising|uprising]] as IG-88A and his fellow [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88 assassin droids]] reprogrammed the droids and took over the planet.<ref name="Therefore" />
